name: nudge-parallel
notes: Control + a CLAUDE.md telling the model to batch independent tool calls in one message. Tests whether a pure prompt makes Claude emit parallel tool_use (no tokenade).
claude_md:
# Tool-use efficiency (IMPORTANT)

When you need several files or shell commands that do NOT depend on each other, request them in a SINGLE message by emitting multiple tool_use blocks at once (parallel tool calls) — never one per turn. For example, to read 12 files, issue all 12 `Read` calls in ONE message, not across 12 turns. Before sending a turn with a single tool call, ask whether you already know the other things you'll need next; if so, request them all now. Each extra turn re-sends the whole conversation, so batching is much cheaper.
